caption: A news broadcast from plustv features a man with a grey traditional cap and white clothing, appearing in a small inset window on the left. He is seen in a thoughtful pose with his hand near his chin. To his right, a blue graphic panel displays the text "ON THE PHONE," identifying the speaker as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS." A purple banner across the bottom reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The screen transitions slightly across the sequence; the bottom ticker changes from a "WATCH ONLINE" prompt with the URL "WWW . PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" to a "SUBSCRIBE" prompt with the link "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." The plustv logo is consistently visible in the upper left corner. The man's posture and the on-screen graphics remain static throughout the clip.
